options.name: <layer_name>
options.description: the name of the layer or the object type

options.name: -color
options.description: a color name or a numeric RGB value

options.name: -lineWidth
options.description: number of pixels in the border of the specified object

options.name: -stipple
options.description: information about the stipple pattern of the object

options.name: -stippleData
options.description: the stipple information for the object
